creator: hiroo@oikumene.gcd.org
text:
Hello,

At Fri, 10 Oct 2008 16:00:23 UT,
Edwin Groothuis wrote:
> Please note that PR ports/128003 has just been submitted.
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.

I approve the repo-copy request.

And please take off my maintainership. I feel I do not have
enough energy to take care of this after work.
